hero.question: Will Tom Steyer win the California Governor Election in 2026?
hero.prob_take: The market is pricing Steyer at 7.6%, a ceiling-low bet that assumes California Democrats either nominate a real politician or the billionaire can't buy his way past a crowded primary. The actual risk is underpriced: Steyer has $billions, name recognition from his 2020 presidential run, and a proven ability to move California politics through spending, making him a viable spoiler if the race fractures between multiple candidates.

daily_take.headline: Steyer surge signals California donors just woke up to 2026
daily_take.deck: Tom Steyer's odds jumped 4.2 points to 7.6% on $301K volume, the biggest move in a quiet market. The jump looks like smart money finally pricing in his proven ability to self-fund and dominate California media. At 7.6%, you're getting value if you believe the field is fragmented enough for a well-capitalized outsider to break through.
